Barbell Bench Press.description: A classic upper body compound lift performed by pressing a barbell upward from the chest while lying flat on a bench.
formCues: Keep your feet flat on the floor
Retract and depress your shoulder blades
Lower the bar to your mid-chest
Drive your feet into the floor as you press up

Dumbbell Goblet Squat.description: A squat variation performed while holding a single dumbbell vertically in front of the chest.
formCues: Hold the dumbbell vertically close to your chest
Keep your chest up and core engaged
Drive your knees out as you lower down
Push through your midfoot to stand up

Single-Arm Dumbbell Row.description: A unilateral pulling exercise performed by supporting the body on a bench and pulling a dumbbell toward the hip to target the upper back.
formCues: Keep your spine neutral and core tight
Pull the dumbbell toward your hip rather than your chest
Squeeze your shoulder blade at the top of the movement

Recover.description: A designated rest period to allow your heart rate to recover and prepare for the next effort.
formCues: Focus on slow, deep nasal breathing.
Allow your muscles to fully relax.
Prepare mentally for the next set.
